title: Polymath Architecture-doc frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of a docs/architecture/<slug>.md authored by polymath-writing:architecture-doc. The skill restrains the doc to C4 levels L1 + L2 (and L3 when interesting); the schema's `levels` enum mirrors that constraint so a doc that claims L4 fails strict validation.

last_updated.description: Optional last-update date. When older than 6 months and `status` is `current`, the catalog's staleness check warns.

model.description: Architectural model framework. C4 is the catalog default; allows others when the doc legitimately uses a different one.

levels.description: C4 levels the document covers. L4 (code-level) MUST NOT appear unless the doc explicitly justifies code-level diagrams; the skill insists on skipping L4 by default.

rfc_link.description: Path / URL to the RFC that drove this doc (when applicable).
